mapper.select: SELECT * FROM t_menu WHERE status = 'NORMAL' AND deleted = 0 ORDER BY order_num ASC
SELECT m.* FROM t_menu m INNER JOIN t_role_menu rm ON m.menu_id = rm.menu_id WHERE rm.role_id = #{roleId} AND m.status = 'NORMAL' AND m.deleted = 0 ORDER BY m.order_num ASC

SELECT DISTINCT m.* FROM t_menu m INNER JOIN t_role_menu rm ON m.menu_id = rm.menu_id INNER JOIN t_user_role ur ON rm.role_id = ur.role_id WHERE ur.user_id = #{userId} AND m.status = 'NORMAL' AND m.deleted = 0 ORDER BY m.order_num ASC
